description_for_human: Cross-feed crypto consensus price across 5 sources. Pay USDC on Base.
description_for_model: Pay-per-call x402 META MCP: composes 5 already-shipped MT services in parallel and returns a cross-feed consensus price (median + mean + spread). POST /v1/crypto/consensus ($0.10) or /v1/crypto/consensus_summary ($0.05). Each unpaid call returns a 402 envelope; pay USDC on Base to 0x1664530DC2A1CA350B1dbaD1Fc1F1a70c90fe4de and retry with X-PAYMENT.
